assertions.description: ReadableStreamBYOBReader.read is exposed as the method extended with options.min.
read(view, {min}) accepts an options dictionary and returns a Promise.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new ReadableStream({type:'bytes',pull(){}});const r=s.getReader({mode:'byob'});const p=r.read(new Uint8Array(1),{min:1});r.releaseLock();return p instanceof Promise;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: options.min equal to 0 rejects with TypeError.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const s=new ReadableStream({type:'bytes',pull(){}});const r=s.getReader({mode:'byob'});try{await r.read(new Uint8Array(1),{min:0});return false;}catch(e){return e instanceof TypeError||e.name==='TypeError';}}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: options.min greater than the supplied view length rejects with RangeError.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const s=new ReadableStream({type:'bytes',pull(){}});const r=s.getReader({mode:'byob'});try{await r.read(new Uint8Array(2),{min:3});return false;}catch(e){return e instanceof RangeError||e.name==='RangeError';}}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: A BYOB read with min resolves once at least the requested number of bytes has been written.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{let sent=false;const s=new ReadableStream({type:'bytes',pull(c){if(sent)return;sent=true;const view=c.byobRequest.view;view[0]=65;view[1]=66;c.byobRequest.respond(2);c.close();}});const r=s.getReader({mode:'byob'});const result=await r.read(new Uint8Array(4),{min:2});return !result.done&&result.value.byteLength===2&&result.value[0]===65&&result.value[1]===66;}catch(e){return false;}})()
